tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Shadow Warrior uses the Build engine (same as Duke Nukem 3D) but specific movement physics parameters are not documented in available sources. Game features confirmed: ladders, vehicles, 3D environments, but no quantified movement values extracted.
